overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime exploration of an urban wasteland area dominated by a massive circular neon-lit structure. The player walks through debris-filled parkland, passes homeless encampments, explores underneath the glowing structure, and emerges onto a commercial street.

events.description: person walks quickly past the camera from right to left
passing by a person sleeping on a concrete bench

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a debris-filled park area toward a massive glowing circular structure in the distance

notable_agents.action: homeless person lying on a concrete bench covered in cardboard

entered.detail: massive circular stadium-like structure with intense pink neon lighting
low concrete bench with a sleeping person
scattered cardboard and litter across the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a massive pink neon-lit circular structure in the distance. The player walks through an urban park area littered with debris, passing a homeless person sleeping on a concrete bench. Palm trees and utility boxes dot the landscape as the camera moves steadily forward.

events.description: large piles of blue trash bags become visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through an overgrown grassy area with scattered trash, approaching the neon structure

entered.detail: large pile of blue plastic garbage bags
vehicle with glowing lights parked in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player moves through an overgrown wasteland area with grass and scattered trash. Large blue garbage bags pile up on the right while illuminated billboards rise in the background. The neon structure shifts to the left as the camera approaches it, with abandoned vehicles visible in the distance.

events.description: entering underneath the massive circular neon structure
camera tilts upward to look at the intricate metal framework and neon lights overhead

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive glowing structure, examining the architecture and neon lighting

notable_agents.action: person in blue clothing standing and looking up at the structure

entered.detail: rusted metal trusses and support columns of the structure
bright pink neon tubes lining the circular framework
small commercial buildings and stalls under the structure
illuminated advertisements visible through the structure

segments.scene_description: The player enters the interior space beneath the massive circular structure, surrounded by intricate metal trusses and intense pink neon lighting. The camera tilts upward to admire the architecture overhead. A few people stand around observing the structure, while commercial kiosks and distant billboards are visible through the framework.

events.description: exiting the structure into a commercial street area
pedestrian crosses the street ahead of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past commercial buildings and street art

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket and orange pants walking down the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete building with American flag mural and '4th STREET' text
tall street light illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from under the neon structure onto a commercial street. The scene features a building with a prominent '4th STREET' mural, street lamps, and parked cars. A pedestrian walks ahead on the sidewalk as the camera continues down the urban street, leaving the glowing structure behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a debris-strewn urban park toward the heart of a neon-lit wasteland before emerging onto a commercial city street. It begins by moving through a park littered with trash and palm trees, passing a homeless person on a concrete bench while a massive pink circular structure looms in the distance. As the camera advances, the terrain shifts into an overgrown wasteland of scattered garbage bags and abandoned vehicles, with the glowing structure gradually shifting into the immediate foreground. The scene then transitions into the interior space beneath the structure, where the camera tilts upward to reveal intricate metal trusses bathed in intense pink light and surrounded by commercial kiosks. Finally, the camera emerges from the neon glow onto a paved urban street, passing a building with a 4th Street mural and parked cars as it leaves the structure behind.
